package_title: I will auto-redact & watermark sensitive PDFs at scale
description:
🔧 I will auto-redact & watermark sensitive PDFs at scale

I deliver a batch pipeline that finds PII, redacts it, and watermarks every page using Stirling-PDF + n8n + your secret-scanner skill — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $149–$399 setup + $79–$199/mo per client
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($49, 3 days, 1 rev): Single template, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($199, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 templates, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($398, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited templates, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your document types/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the automation
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
